about.title: Resume & Experience
about.p1: Hi, I am Xravity — a creator passionate about design and technology. I believe good design should be clean and powerful, like gravity itself — naturally drawing the eye.
about.p2: I specialize in brand design, front-end development, and digital art. My work spans visual design, interactive experiences, and code.
about.p3: I have collaborated with startups and brands to build unique digital identities. In my free time, I enjoy photography, writing, and exploring new frontiers in tech.

timeline.title: Freelance Designer
timeline.desc: Brand identity and UI/UX for various clients.

timeline.title: Design Intern
timeline.desc: Assisted with visual design and prototyping.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.sub: A collection of moments captured through my lens.
